# Bhavya Panchal — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio and website for Bhavya Panchal, a frontend developer & UI engineer from Ahmedabad, India.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: SvelteKit (Svelte 5 with runes mode)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4
- **Animation**: GSAP, Lenis (smooth scroll)
- **UI Components**: shadcn-svelte, Lucide icons
- **Content**: MDsveX (.svx / .md files)
- **Deployment**: Vercel (adapter-vercel)
- **Package Manager**: yarn
- **Extras**: ESLint, Prettier, nodemailer (contact form)

## Project Structure

```
src/
├── lib/
│   ├── components/      # Svelte components (banner, header, footer, about, projects, contact, etc.)
│   │   └── ui/          # Reusable UI primitives (button, container, section, typography)
│   ├── data/            # Static data (projects list)
│   ├── actions/         # Svelte actions
│   ├── hooks/           # SvelteKit hooks
│   ├── email/           # Email utilities (nodemailer)
│   ├── seo.ts           # SEO metadata & JSON-LD schemas
│   └── utils.ts         # Shared utilities
├── routes/
│   ├── +page.svelte     # Home page
│   ├── about-me/        # About page
│   ├── journey/         # Career journey / experience page
│   ├── projects/        # Projects showcase
│   ├── contact/         # Contact form (+page.server.ts with nodemailer)
│   └── api/             # API endpoints
└── app.html             # HTML shell template
```

## Scripts

| Command           | Description                    |
| ----------------- | ------------------------------ |
| `yarn dev`        | Start dev server               |
| `yarn build`      | Production build               |
| `yarn preview`    | Preview production build       |
| `yarn check`      | Type-check with svelte-check   |
| `yarn lint`       | Prettier check + ESLint        |
| `yarn format`     | Format with Prettier           |

## Key Configuration

- **Vite config**: `vite.config.ts` — Tailwind CSS v4 Vite plugin, SvelteKit with runes mode + async, MDsveX preprocessor, adapter-vercel
- **TypeScript**: `tsconfig.json`
- **ESLint**: `eslint.config.js` — flat config with eslint-plugin-svelte and prettier
- **Prettier**: `.prettierrc` with `prettier-plugin-svelte` and `prettier-plugin-tailwindcss`
- **shadcn-svelte**: `components.json`

## Notes

- All `$lib` imports resolve to `src/lib/`
- Site is deployed on Vercel
- Contact form uses nodemailer via a SvelteKit form action (`+page.server.ts`)
- The project uses Svelte 5 runes mode (`$state`, `$derived`, `$effect`, `$props`)
- Environment variables in `.env` (see `.env.example` for template)
